reading.title: The Book of Disquiet
reading.author: Fernando Pessoa
reading.note: Returning to it. Each time it means something different.

reading.title: Simulacra and Simulation
reading.author: Jean Baudrillard
reading.note: Slower going than expected. Appropriately disorienting.

listening.title: Music for Airports
listening.note: For late nights and long reads.

thinking: Whether slowness is a discipline or a temperament — and whether the distinction matters.
The difference between melancholy and sadness. Melancholy has an object. Sadness does not.
What it means to finish something. The strange grief of completion.
working: A long essay on the ethics of rereading.
Several beginnings that have not yet decided what they want to be.
